zh.Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭越可爾巴福斯 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pudsey於1435年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴福斯 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph Pudsay46歲，母親Margaret Tunstall20歲。他於1445年之前與Grace Hamerton在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年8月12日在英國越可爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pudsey于1435年出生在英国英格兰越可爾巴福斯 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Pudsay46岁，母亲Margaret Tunstall20岁。他于1445年之前与Grace Hamerton在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1492年8月12日在英国越可爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pudsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pudsey was born in 1435, in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Pudsay, was 46 and his mother, Margaret Tunstall, was 20. He married Grace Hamerton before 1445, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 August 1492, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pudsey est né en 1435, à Barforth Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Pudsay, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tunstall, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Grace Hamerton avant 1445, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1492, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat vor 1445 in Yorkshire, England Grace Hamerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1492 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pudseyが1435年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバーフォース ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Pudsayは46歳，母Margaret Tunstallは20歳であった。1445年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでGrace Hamertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年8月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pudsey(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바포스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Pudsay(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Tunstall(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1445년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Grace Hamerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 8월 12일 영국 요르크실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Hamerton перед 1445 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1492 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
